prediction.reasoning: Based on MDT's historical volatility as a large-cap healthcare stock, I estimated an 18-day price prediction using typical stock return distributions. MDT generally exhibits moderate volatility with annualized volatility around 20-25%. For an 18-day period, this translates to approximately 2-4% standard deviation. The point estimate assumes slight upward drift typical of established healthcare companies. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming log-normal price distribution with increasing width for higher confidence levels.
